negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_294
prompt: A dynamic curling sequence captures a player in action on an indoor ice rink. Dressed in a white outfit with a red vest and black shoes, the player is crouched low, gripping a yellow curling broom in one hand and guiding a curling stone with the other. The stone, marked by a red handle and textured surface, is positioned near the center of the rink, bordered by a blue boundary line and a circular target area outlined in red and white. The player's body shifts as they push the stone forward, sweeping the broom along the ice to control its speed. The stone glides smoothly, following the player's guidance, as the camera follows the stone's movement, capturing the player's focused and determined expression. The solid blue wall in the background emphasizes the indoor setting.
